tools.name: get_fec_candidates
tools.description: Get FEC campaign finance data for federal election candidates. Returns fundraising totals, cash on hand, and spending by office (President/Senate/House), state, or party.

tools.name: get_fec_donors
tools.description: Get individual donor/contribution data for a candidate or committee from FEC Schedule A filings. Find who is funding campaigns.

tools.name: get_fec_spending
tools.description: Get campaign spending data. Type=independent for Super PAC / outside group spending for/against candidates. Type=expenditures for direct campaign spending.
